Filipinas.about:
I am Roy Herrera, a dedicated backup and storage system administrator based in Pasig City, with over a decade of experience in ensuring the availability, integrity, and security of critical data. Since 2011, I have specialized in designing, implementing, and managing robust backup and storage solutions that support enterprise-level operations.

My expertise includes administering enterprise storage systems, configuring and maintaining SAN fabrics—including SAN switch management—and supporting a diverse range of operating systems such as Windows, Linux, AIX, and UNIX. I also possess hands-on experience with virtualization platforms, including VMware, Hyper-V, and Nutanix, allowing me to deliver resilient and scalable infrastructure solutions.

Throughout my career, I’ve had the privilege of working with an organization that fosters inclusivity, treats every employee with fairness, and prioritizes their well-being—values I deeply appreciate and align with. I am committed to continuous growth and excellence in data protection and infrastructure management.

India.headline: Backup Administrator | Expert in Data Protection, Backup & Recovery Solutions | Ensuring Business Continuity & Efficient Data Management | Serving notice period
India.about:
Commvault Backup Administrator with 3+ years in enterprise data protection and recovery.
Specialises in Commvault v11 across physical, virtual, and hybrid cloud environments.
Owns end-to-end backup lifecycle, from CommCell design to restore and BMR.
Safeguards multi-petabyte estates, ensuring stringent RPO, RTO, and uptime commitments.
Collaborates with infra, storage, and application teams to stabilise backup performance.
Tunes backup policies, deduplication, and schedules to shrink windows and resource load.
Handles SAN, NAS, tape libraries, and cloud storage tiers for scalable protection.
Leverages ServiceNow and ITIL practices for incidents, changes, and problem management.
Supports audits, governance reviews, and compliance checks through accurate reporting.
Open to opportunities in backup engineering, DR, and business continuity.

Contact me at pandeyamit011999@gmail.com to discuss roles or further collaborations.

Career Highlights:
	•	Protected 5PB+ data across 1300+ servers with high SLA adherence.
	•	Reduced backup failure rates by 30% through proactive monitoring and RCA.
	•	Shortened backup completion times by 15% via tuning and dedup optimisation.
	•	Executed regular DR drills validating production restore paths for critical services.
	•	Streamlined incident handling, improving resolution times using structured troubleshooting.
	•	Standardised runbooks and SOPs, boosting team consistency and onboarding speed.
	•	Supported cloud backup integration for AWS and Azure workloads and storage.
	•	Partnered with client stakeholders to align backup posture with evolving risks.

Skills:
Backup & Recovery: Commvault v11, CommCell Console, storage policies, schedules, restores, BMR.
Storage & Platforms: Tape libraries, SAN, NAS, VMware, Hyper-V, Windows, Linux environments.
Cloud & Integration: AWS backups, Azure workloads, cloud libraries, hybrid data protection.
Monitoring & Governance: ServiceNow, health dashboards, alerts, reporting, audit support, ITSM.
Business Continuity: DR planning, RPO/RTO alignment, capacity planning, documentation, SOPs.

currentPosition.description:
As a Commvault Backup Administrator, I manage enterprise-scale data protection and recovery operations across multiple environments, ensuring seamless backup performance and data integrity. I work closely with infrastructure, storage, and application teams to maintain reliable backup solutions and meet strict SLAs for business continuity.

🔹 Key Responsibilities & Achievements

Administer and maintain Commvault backup environments, including installation, configuration, policy creation, and upgrade management.

Manage NAS, SAN, and tape library integrations to ensure data redundancy and retention compliance.

Perform backup, restore, and disaster recovery (DR) operations across virtual and physical environments.

Troubleshoot backup and restore failures, VSS issues, and client connectivity with strong root-cause analysis.

Implement and monitor SLA performance, ensuring successful job completion and proactive issue resolution.

Coordinate Bare Metal Recovery (BMR) and cross-platform restores to minimize downtime and data loss.

Utilize ServiceNow for incident, change, and request management, maintaining clear communication with stakeholders.

Generate daily/weekly performance reports and optimize backup throughput for better efficiency.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure compliance, audit readiness, and data protection best practices.

Participate in DR drills and validation exercises to verify recovery reliability and RTO/RPO compliance.

India.headline: Infrastructure Engineer L3 @ Apex Systems | Ex-TCSer | Ex–Zen & Art | Ex–Wiproite
India.about:
I began my career with Wipro in 2019 as a Technical Support Engineer, specializing in backup technologies. Over the past 7 years, I’ve built a strong foundation in IT infrastructure, developing expertise in providing L1 & L2 technical support, solving complex issues, and helping customers optimize performance across diverse enterprise environments. My journey has been defined by hands‑on work with enterprise backup solutions and virtualization technologies, where I’ve consistently delivered tailored solutions and collaborated across teams to resolve analytical challenges.

Currently, I am working with Commvault backup tool as an Infrastructure Engineer (L3), where I handle advanced troubleshooting, deployment, and optimization of enterprise backup environments. This role has elevated my expertise to the next level, allowing me to lead escalations, design resilient backup strategies, and ensure seamless data protection for global clients. I manage complex infrastructure challenges, performance tuning, automation, and enterprise‑scale backup management, which has strengthened my ability to deliver high‑availability solutions in mission‑critical environments.

What I Bring to the Table:
 • Proficiency in backup tools: Avamar, NetWorker, Veritas, Cohesity, Commvault.
 • Advanced L3 support in Commvault infrastructure, including performance tuning and automation
 • Expertise in VMware backup/recovery, Data Domain, and troubleshooting complex issues
 • Strong foundation in Windows & Linux servers, cloud platforms, and networking fundamentals 
 • Installation, deployment, migration, and bare metal restore for Networker (AFTD, DD) 
 • Tape Library configuration (PTL, VTL, NDMP) and NDMP backups (VNX, Isilon) 
 • Knowledge of Networker Modules – SQL, Exchange, AOAG, Hyper‑V (VSS/RCT), Oracle RMAN

Let’s connect and explore how my expertise in backup and infrastructure engineering can add value to your organization.

India.headline: Senior Backup Administrator
India.about:
Having worked for  9  years in the field, I have gained hands-on experience with various versions of NetBackup, including 7.6, 7.7.3, 8.0, 8.1.1, 8.1.2, and 10.5.0.1 Versions. My expertise extends to installation and configuration of Master/Media and Client Machines, as well as Database agents. I am adept at configuring policies and storage units, ensuring successful backup and recovery operations, and implementing backup strategies to meet data protection requirements.

Throughout my career, I have demonstrated my ability to troubleshoot backup infrastructure issues, analyze and resolve problems, and utilize ticketing tools like Remedy and Service Now. With my strong knowledge of Windows and UNIX operating systems, I have successfully performed catalog backups and restores, managed backup tools like Backup Exec System Recovery and Symantec System Recovery, and upgraded software patches to enhance functionality.

One of my key strengths is my ability to handle large backup environments, such as Veritas NetBackup, and manage around 2000+ servers, both virtual and physical. I am responsible for maintaining file systems, VM ware, Hyper-V, and DHCP backups, and I monitor the Master Server, Media server, and alerts on a daily basis. Additionally, I have experience in configuring application backups for NDMP, SQL, ORACLE, and VMware.

I am confident in my ability to contribute to [Company Name]'s backup infrastructure and ensure the smooth and secure operation of data protection systems. My strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and ability to work effectively in a 24/7 rotational environment make me a valuable asset to any team.

multiLocaleHeadline.headline: Senior Backup Administrator

experience.description: Trading Servers Backups for CM, FO, CD, EIPO, OFS, SLBM & COMMODITY are executed on a daily basis as per go ahead from Application Owners. HOT, RMAN Backups, Users + Archive & Export backups of database servers through Control-M workflow on daily basis after production hours. Verification of the current day tapes in master server catalogue before using it for regular backup and check the backup image expiry date on all the master servers condole before reusing the tapes for daily and weekly backups. For backup failure of the clients, raise a request in snow to the respective support team (OS/Network/Firewall/Security/DBA etc.) Monitoring of Tape Out operations from the DD (Dell Data Domain) to Tapes. Configuration of new backup policy with specific retention period specify by business users in the Approved SNOW request. Labeling of all tapes before taking the Daily, Weekly and Permanent backups. Removal of decommissioned servers from existing backup policy as per approval SNOW request by application User/End User. Movement of Non-Reachable / Unknown clients to stale policy and track them separately with OS Team/Asset Team/Application Owners for resolution.

Responsible for maintaining and configuring different application backups like NDMP, SQL, ORACLE and VM Ware. Develop project concepts and maintain optimal workflow. Performed Stop /Start and Restart of NetBackup services for planed activity. Performed Full System Restore and Ad-Hoc Restores and troubleshooter of restore problems. Hands of experience on NetBackup 8.0,8.1.1,8.2 and 10.1 Versions. Having good knowledge of NBU installation on windows and Linux servers. Involved in installation, Configuration, Upgradation, Patching and Troubleshooting on Mater, Media and Client servers. Performed work health check and environment monitoring and managed the escalations.

Overseen around 350+ Servers (Virtual and Physical) and Responsible for maintaining File System and VM Ware Backups. Investigating the Reinforcement Issues by dissecting the NetBackup logs. Act faithfully, honestly and diligently at all time to resolve the backup issues. Dealing with compliances such as auditing, health and safety, other risk. Vast knowledge in NetBackup 7.6,7.7.3 and 8.0 Versions. Maintained daily, Weekly and Monthly Backup reports. Monitoring mater server and media server alerts on daily basis.

India.headline: Senior IT Infrastructure Engineer | VMware & Nutanix SME | Linux Systems Expert | Enterprise Backup & DR | VCP | MCP | Driving Resilient & Scalable Infrastructure Globally
India.about:
I’m a seasoned IT Infrastructure Engineer with over 15 years of hands-on experience in architecting, deploying, and optimizing resilient, high-performance infrastructure across global enterprise environments. My specialization lies in virtualization, hyper-converged platforms, Linux system administration, and enterprise-grade data protection solutions.

My core technical stack includes deep expertise in VMware vSphere (vCenter, ESXi, vDS), Nutanix (AHV & Prism), Linux systems (RHEL, CentOS), and Veritas NetBackup for robust disaster recovery and compliance. From designing scalable virtualization environments to implementing automated workflows using PowerShell, PowerCLI, and Ansible, I bring a proactive approach to IT operations and problem-solving.

I’ve successfully led infrastructure transformation projects, conducted risk assessments, and ensured regulatory compliance (including PCI DSS) across multiple data centers spanning regions like the UK, US, and India. I work seamlessly with cross-functional teams, vendors, and leadership to deliver continuous uptime, operational excellence, and business alignment.

My strengths include:

Virtualization lifecycle management and P2V migrations

Linux system hardening, performance tuning, and secure configurations

End-to-end data protection, backup replication, and DR testing

Infrastructure automation, remote troubleshooting, and technical mentoring

I hold certifications as a VMware Certified Professional (VCP) and Microsoft Certified Professional (MCP), and I’m driven by continuous learning, team success, and making infrastructure invisible yet powerful for end users.

Let’s connect if you’re looking for someone who can engineer stability, scalability, and security into every layer of your IT foundation.

#ITInfrastructure #InfrastructureEngineering #VMware #vSphere #Nutanix #LinuxAdministrator #HyperConvergedInfrastructure #DataProtection #NetBackup #DisasterRecovery #SystemAutomation #PowerShell #Ansible #CloudInfrastructure #TechLeadership #InfrastructureResilience #InfrastructureTransformation #ServerManagement #ITOperationsExcellence #VCP #MCP #EnterpriseIT
